title: EU Carmakers Demand Flexibility Beyond 2035 Combustion Ban
content: EuropeГўв‚¬в„ўs at a crossroads in its quest for industrial decarbonization, and the big wigs at ACEA (thatГўв‚¬в„ўs the European Automobile ManufacturersГўв‚¬в„ў Association) and CLEPA (the European Association of Automotive Suppliers) just sounded a pretty stark alarm: the EUГўв‚¬в„ўs plan to outlaw new combustion-engine cars by 2035 might be dreaming if it doesnГўв‚¬в„ўt reckon with industry realities and geopolitical hurdles.ACEA, based in Brussels, rallies the titans of the car worldГўв‚¬вЂќthink Mercedes-Benz, BMW and VolkswagenГўв‚¬вЂќwhile CLEPA speaks for more than 3,000 suppliers, from Schaeffler AG to Valeo.
author: Analysts Account
